RAID LOG — Healthcare Integration Pilot
Prepared by: Project team

RISKS

ID | Description         | Impact | Likelihood | Owner        | Mitigation
R1 | Vendor risk         | High   | Medium     | Project team | Monitor closely
R2 | Resource risk       | Medium | Medium     | Project team | Escalate as needed
R3 | Timeline risk       | High   | Low        | Project team | Monitor closely
R4 | Quality risk        | Medium | Medium     | Project team | Review regularly
R5 | Budget risk         | Medium | Low        | Project team | Monitor closely
R6 | Communication risk  | Low    | Medium     | Project team | Communicate clearly
R7 | Change risk         | Medium | Medium     | Project team | Manage change

ISSUES

ID | Description         | Impact | Owner        | Action
I1 | Testing delay       | Medium | Project team | Monitor closely
I2 | Doc approval delay  | Low    | Project team | Follow up

ASSUMPTIONS

ID | Description                      | Owner
A1 | Resources will be available      | Project team
A2 | Vendor will deliver on time      | Project team
A3 | Requirements will not change     | Project team

DEPENDENCIES

ID | Description       | Owner        | Mitigation
D1 | Vendor delivery   | Project team | Monitor closely
D2 | Internal IT       | Project team | Coordinate
D3 | Stakeholder input | Project team | Keep in touch

This RAID log will be reviewed regularly.
